chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3455 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution. 04.09.2025. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Jatoi, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------- Learned counsel for the Petitioner states that he does not press this Petition and would approach the competent Forum as certain amendments have been made in the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act 2024, providing for Bail Applications to be entertained by the concerned Forum. As such, the instant Petition stands dismissed as not pressed, leaving the Petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
